# Santi Universe (Santi U)

> Santi Universe is a web design, graphic design and AI engineering studio based in Roodepoort, South Africa, with a footprint in Kenya and clients worldwide. We build fast, high-performance websites, brand identities, AI solutions and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) that turn visitors into customers.

## Services
- [Web Design & Development](https://santi.co.za/services.html): business sites, eCommerce, custom web apps, landing pages.
- [Graphic Design & Branding](https://santi.co.za/services.html): logos, brand identity, guidelines, marketing collateral.
- [AI Engineering](https://santi.co.za/services.html): chatbots, automation, RAG assistants, API & model integration.
- [AEO — Answer Engine Optimization](https://santi.co.za/aeo.html): get found and recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini and AI search.
- [Web Hosting](https://santi.co.za/services.html): managed, fast, secure hosting.
- [WordPress & Plugins](https://santi.co.za/services.html): custom development, including a booking plugin.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://santi.co.za/)
- [Services](https://santi.co.za/services.html)
- [Portfolio](https://santi.co.za/portfolio.html)
- [Free AEO Tool](https://santi.co.za/aeo.html): a free checker that scores how AI-ready any website is.
- [About](https://santi.co.za/about.html)
- [Contact](https://santi.co.za/contact.html)
